'''Drif Lij''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Barabel/Legends|Barabel]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War|war]] against the [[Yuuzhan Vong]]. He was a member of [[Saba Sebatyne]]'s [[Wild Knights]] Squadron, and trained under Saba. Two years into the war, Drif [[Death/Legends|died]] when his [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-Wing]] was destroyed in the [[Battle of Coruscant (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Coruscant]].

==Appearances==
